articles.title: Tesla’s revenue rises again as it prepares for more AI and robotics
articles.description: Tesla released its 2026 first-quarter financial earnings today, providing another look at the progress of Elon Musk's $1 trillion bet to transform his company into a leader of AI and robotics. Tesla said it earned $477 million in net income on $22.4 billion i…

articles.title: Elon Musk admits that millions of Tesla vehicles won’t get unsupervised FSD
articles.description: Tesla vehicles with the company's Hardware 3 (HW3) computer actually won't receive unsupervised Full Self-Driving (FSD), CEO Elon Musk said on Wednesday's Q1 2026 earnings call. Approximately 4 million Tesla vehicles operate on the HW3 platform, meaning that …

articles.title: Tesla hits Musk’s threshold for ‘safe unsupervised’ driving
articles.description: We've crossed yet another one of Elon Musk's self-driving thresholds. Tesla's fleet of vehicles using the company's Full Self-Driving (Supervised) system has driven over 10 billion miles, according to the company's updated safety page. That means the company …

articles.title: SpaceX has a $55 billion plan to build AI chips in Texas
articles.description: Elon Musk's plans to get into the AI chip manufacturing business are going to be costly. As the New York Times and CNBC report, SpaceX is planning to invest at least $55 billion into its "Terafab" chip plant in Austin, Texas. That's according to the details o…

articles.title: Musk’s biggest loyalist became his biggest liability
articles.description: I sat down in the Musk v. Altman trial courtroom today, painfully aware that no one was going to ask Shivon Zilis the question on everyone's minds: Girl, what the fuck are you doing? Zilis, who testified under oath that she is the mother of four of Musk's chi…

articles.title: Elon Musk and Sam Altman’s court showdown will dish the dirt
articles.description: Elon Musk cofounded OpenAI, and then flounced off in a huff when he wasn't anointed CEO, leaving Sam Altman as the last power-hungry man standing. Now, Musk is back with a lawsuit, and a trial is scheduled to start in Oakland, California, on April 27th. Theor…

articles.title: Elon Musk’s worst enemy in court is Elon Musk
articles.description: About five hours into Elon Musk's testimony, I typed the following sentence into my notes: "I have never been more sympathetic to Sam Altman in my life." Musk's direct testimony was an improvement over yesterday - even if his lawyer kept asking leading questi…

articles.title: Closing time

articles.title: Sam Altman was winning on the stand, but it might not be enough

articles.description: Apple is about to become a very different company. This September, Apple CEO Tim Cook is stepping down and will be replaced by John Ternus, the current head of hardware. But the shift is bigger than just a CEO transition - it's the most significant move yet i…

articles.description: The company disclosed the mystery acquisition in a single line of a securities filing, as Elon Musk's companies have been ramping up spending on AI.

articles.title: Intel's Stock Soars 24% Friday, Its Biggest One-Day Gain Since 1987
articles.description:
Intel's stock price soared 24% Friday. It's the stock's largest single-day spike since since October 1987, reports CNBC, "as investors cheered signs of renewed growth due to mounting artificial intelligence demand."

The stock closed at $82.57 and is now up 1…

articles.title: Sam Altman Testifies That Elon Musk Wanted Control of OpenAI
articles.description: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman took the stand Tuesday in Elon Musk's trial against the company, testifying that Musk repeatedly sought control of OpenAI before leaving in 2018. Altman said he opposed putting AI "under the control of any one person," while Musk's lawye…

articles.title: Elon Musk pushed back the launch of the Tesla Roadster. Again.
articles.description: Elon Musk delayed the new Tesla Roadster release yet again, saying it could be coming "in a month or so."

articles.title: Tesla slips one-sentence disclosure of a mysterious $2 billion AI hardware acquisition into its latest filing

articles.title: The bill for Tesla's AI expansion just keeps getting bigger
articles.description: Tesla said on Wednesday it would hike capex spending this year to over $25 billion as it doubles down on Musk's aggressive pivot to AI and robotics.
